heading: CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
operative_text: A driver's license number, personal identification certificate number, or social security account number, or the name, age, home address, or home telephone number of a child, provided in an application for an exemption filed with a chief appraiser is confidential and not open to public inspection. The information may not be disclosed to anyone other than an employee or agent of the appraisal district who appraises property or performs appraisal services for the appraisal district, except as authorized by Subsection (b).
_note: No defined terms section present. Cross-refs are internal subsection references within the same statute.
